quote: shall not accept for filing any section of a petition which does not have attached to it the notarized affidavit required by this section
At least one thousand five hundred in each congressional district for the office of president and vice president
shall not circulate a petition to nominate a candidate unless the person is a citizen of the United States and at least eighteen years of age
petitions may be signed electronically from any mobile device anywhere in the state of Colorado
the elections official shall examine and verify each signature filed
This section applies only to candidates for the office of United States senator or representative in Congress
